title: ammannia elata
intro: Ammannia elata, also known as the 'Hari Chandan' or 'Ammanni,' is a plant species that belongs to the family Lythraceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties, which can help in treating various health issues such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Ammannia elata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Ammannia elata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be used to treat different health conditions, and its extracts are also used in pharmaceutical preparations.
